BlackPill
  • Index

Index

C | D | F | G | M | R | S

C

  • calc_crc8() (dro_hal.DROController method)
  • close() (dro_hal.DROController method)

D

  • DRO_DTMOK (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_ERR_CRC (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_ERR_INVALID_AXIS (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_ERR_NOT_ACCEPTED (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_ERR_SEND_FAIL (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_GET_CONTROLLER_INFO (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_GET_DEVICE_INFO (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_GET_PARAMS (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_GET_R0X_VALUE (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_GET_W0X_VALUE (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • dro_hal
    • module
  • DRO_JUMP_BOOTLOADER (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_AXIS_FLAG (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_BUZZER_STATE (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_CUSTOM_DIVIDER (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_DIVIDER_INDEX (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_ENCODER_RESOLUTION (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_HC05_CONFIG (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_NEXT_DIVIDER (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_PARAMS (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_POSITION_MONITOR_PARAMS (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_PREV_DIVIDER (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_R0X (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_R0X_VALUE (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_TRANSMISSION (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_W0X_VALUE (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SET_ZERO (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DRO_SUCCESS (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • DROController (class in dro_hal)

F

  • FMT_CONTROLLER_INFO_REC (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • FMT_DEVICE_CONTEXT_INFO (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • FMT_DRO_INFO_REC (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • FMT_POSITION_MONITOR (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • FMT_TRANSMISSION_PARAMS (dro_hal.DROController attribute)

G

  • get_device_info() (dro_hal.DROController method)
  • get_w0x_value() (dro_hal.DROController method)

M

  • MAX_AXES (dro_hal.DROController attribute)
  • module
    • dro_hal

R

  • read_controller_info() (dro_hal.DROController method)

S
